metadata.title: Image Context Menus
metadata.description: Copy to clipboard, Open in default app, Show in system explorer, Reveal file in navigation, Open in new tab context menus for images.

regex.target: Notice("图片已复制并放入剪贴板",T.successNotice)

regex.source: Notice("Error, could not copy the image!")
Notice("Image was temporarily saved and will be removed in 1 minute")
regex.target: Notice("图像暂时保存，将在1分钟内删除")

regex.source: .setName("Middle mouse click on image link to open in new tab")
regex.target: .setName("用鼠标中键单击图像链接以在新选项卡中打开")
.setName("在画布上启用常规上下文菜单")

regex.source: .setDesc("You might want to disable this if you use a plugin for replacing default Obsidian file navigation. This plugin supports File Tree Alternative by displaying a reveal menu item for it if installed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果您使用插件替换默认的Obsidian文件导航，则可能需要禁用此功能。此插件支持文件树替代方案，如果已安装，则显示其显示菜单项。")

regex.source: .setDesc(`The regular context menu sometimes duplicates the context menu on the canvas, so it's disabled there by default.
regex.target: .setDesc(`常规上下文菜单有时会复制画布上的上下文菜单，因此默认情况下该菜单在画布上处于禁用状态。

regex.source: There is a separate context menu for images directly on the canvas, but if that's not enough (for example for images in notes on canvas), you can enable the regular context menu here too.
regex.target: 对于画布上的图像，有一个单独的上下文菜单，但如果这还不够 (例如，对于画布上注释中的图像), 您也可以在这里启用常规上下文菜单。
